case.title: TAYLOR v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE

opinion.h: TAYLOR v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE, 296 U.S. 594 (1935)
Winthrop TAYLOR, petitioner, v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE.* No. 183.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Fred A. Woodis, of Washington, D. C., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 296 U.S. 662, 56 S. Ct. 167.[ Taylor v. Commissioner of Internal Revenue 296 U.S. 594 (1935) ]
